data.title: Google Announces Major Layoffs As Pichai Stresses Efficiency
data.description: Google has reduced its top management roles by 10% as part of a multi-year effort to streamline operations and boost efficiency.

data.title: Investment Guru Peter Lynch: 'Often Great Investments Are The Ones Where Everyone Else Will Think You Are Crazy'
data.description: Peter Lynch, a renowned investor and former fund manager of the Magellan Fund at Fidelity Investments, achieved a legendary compound annual return of 29% during the 1980s.

data.title: Mary Trump's Warning: Donald Trump's Second Term 'Already Is More Dangerous Than the First'
data.description: Mary Trump, niece of President-elect Trump and one of his most vocal critics, has issued a stark warning about what to expect from her uncle's second administration.

data.title: 'Skip Forward': Cruise Company Markets $159K 4-Year World Tour To Election-Weary Travelers
Luigi Mangione Lands In Same Brooklyn Jail As Diddy And FTX's Bankman-Fried
data.description: The alleged murderer of UnitedHealth Group CEO Brian Thompson has been transferred to the Metropolitan Detention Center in Brooklyn, New York.
